headline: Nvidia's $6.9 billion side bet just paid off in a big way
summary: Back in 2020, Nvidia dropped $6.9 billion on a company most people had never heard of, Mellanox, an Israeli outfit that made networking switches and adapters. At the time, it barely registered. Jensen Huang was buying GPUs, building the chip story, and a networking company felt like a rounding ...

headline: The Nasdaq 100 Has Tripled Since 2020, But These 10 Mega-Caps Are Still Underwater

headline: Shorting Out-of-the-Money Cisco Puts and Calls Provides Shareholders Extra Income
summary: Over the last month, selling short out-of-the-money (OTM) Cisco Systems put and call options has worked well for existing shareholders. Moreover, for the next month, it looks like a good play as well.

headline: Cisco (CSCO) Pushes Further Into Quantum Security And Enterprise AI
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) is a founding partner in the new Quantum Communication Fieldlab Rotterdam, focused on quantum secure networking. The initiative is intended to test and validate quantum resistant communication infrastructure in real world conditions. Cisco also launched the Secure AI Factory with Equinix and NVIDIA, aimed at simplifying enterprise scale AI deployment. The Secure AI Factory centers on pre integrated infrastructure that combines networking, compute, and colocation...
